title: Wondrous Wilds: Terraforged Edition
body:
Wondrous Wilds: Terraforged Edition is the first of a series of 5 modpacks aimed to enhance the vanilla experience.
Features:

 -New biomes for the Overworld, Nether and End.
 
 -Enhanced Terrain featuring more interesting landscape such as mountains and wide rivers.
 
 -New animals that help improve ambients.
 
 -New variations for villages and pillager outposts.

 -Two semi-realistic shaderpacks to choose from.
